Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Approval of Apportionment of Minors Settlement. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler; Bailiff: R. Guitron. Plaintiff, Jacqueline Davis, was represented by Nancy Williams, Esq. The Court grants settlement to each of the minors: Charlotte - 17; Cylethia - 16; Nadio - 14; Keriten - 12; and Laquisha - ll as follows: Compromise: $7,201.32; Costs: $900.97, Attorney Fees: $1,575.09 and a net balance of $4,725.26 to be deposited into a blocked account until the minors attain the age of majority (18). Future disbursements to be made the same way by the petitioner. Order signed in open court.
